world.title: Gunfire in Hormuz: Indian-flagged tanker among ships targeted as Iran closes strait again
world.summary: Tensions in the Strait of Hormuz have intensified as Iranian gunboats reportedly opened fire, prompting several vessels, including an Indian-flagged supertanker, to turn back. This escalation raises concerns over the safety of this vital oil route, which has seen increased volatility. The situation has led to heightened scrutiny and calls for diplomatic efforts to ensure maritime security.

world.title: 2 Iranian Gunboats Fire On Tanker In Hormuz, Crew Safe: UK Body
world.summary: Two Iranian gunboats fired on a tanker in the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday, following Iran's decision to reimpose restrictions on the waterway. This incident occurred a day after U.S. President Donald Trump announced the continuation of a naval blockade in the region. Fortunately, the crew of the tanker remained safe despite the attack.

world.title: US-Israel-Iran War Live: Hormuz sees first tanker movement in weeks, but Tehran signals strait may close again
world.summary: US President Donald Trump stated negotiations with Iran are progressing, but Tehran demands the lifting of the US blockade for the Strait of Hormuz to remain open. Iran denied agreeing to transfer enriched uranium. The US Central Command reported 21 vessels turned back since April 13. A cruise ship recently crossed the strait, indicating limited maritime movement.

business.title: Meta layoffs: 8,000 employees likely to be sacked in massive workforce purge on May 20
business.summary: Meta is set to lay off approximately 8,000 employees, representing about 10% of its global workforce, on May 20. This marks the company's largest workforce reduction since restructuring efforts in late 2022 and early 2023. Additional layoffs are anticipated in the latter half of the year, according to three sources familiar with the company's plans.

business.title: Ola Sona Weekend Announced with Benefits of Up To Rs 50,000
business.summary: Ola Electric has announced the 'Ola Sona Weekend' promotion, offering benefits of up to Rs 50,000 on its S1 range of e-scooters and Roadster line-up of e-motorcycles. This offer is valid exclusively on April 18 and 19. Customers can take advantage of these discounts during this limited-time event to purchase electric vehicles from the company.

business.title: Tesla Model Y L (6-Seater) Could Launch In India On April 22nd - Report
business.summary: Tesla is reportedly set to launch the Model Y L, a 6-seater version of its standard Model Y, in India on April 22nd. This variant is currently exclusive to China. The move appears to be part of Tesla's strategy to improve its reception among Indian SUV buyers, following a lukewarm response to the initial Model Y offering.

technology.title: iPhone 18 Pro launch: New dark cherry colour and design changes
technology.summary: Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro is expected to feature a new Dark Cherry color and design modifications, including a smaller Dynamic Island and an updated camera module. The company is generating anticipation ahead of the September launch, with rumors suggesting significant upgrades. Early discussions indicate that these changes may enhance the overall user experience of the device.

technology.title: WhatsApp Developing Automatic Business Chat Separation To Reduce Inbox Clutter
technology.summary: WhatsApp is developing a feature for Android that will automatically separate business chats from personal conversations after 24 hours. This initiative aims to reduce inbox clutter and spam for users. The new functionality is reported by WABetaInfo, a WhatsApp tracking portal, and is designed to enhance user experience by organizing chat categories more effectively.

technology.title: Nano Banana Google Photos sparks powerful new privacy concerns
technology.summary: Google's Nano Banana now integrates with Google Photos through Gemini’s Personal Intelligence, prompting new privacy concerns. This development transforms users' photo libraries into resources for AI-generated images, raising questions about data usage, consent, and image safeguards. While it offers personalized creations, the implications for user privacy and data security are under increased scrutiny as AI technology evolves.

sports.title: IPL 2026: Match 29, PBKS vs LSG Match Prediction
sports.summary: In Match 29 of IPL 2026, the Punjab Kings (PBKS) face the Lucknow Super Giants (LSG) at the Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium. Fans and analysts are eager to predict the outcome of this exciting match in the ongoing tournament. The match promises to be a competitive encounter as both teams aim for victory in the league.

sports.title: "No Disrespect To Sanju Samson": CSK Sent Blunt Message Over MS Dhoni's Selection
sports.summary: Chennai Super Kings are gearing up for an important match against Sunrisers Hyderabad. Former Mumbai cricketer Aditya Tare emphasized MS Dhoni's crucial role in the team's dynamics, highlighting his leadership and strategic insights as vital for navigating challenging situations. Tare clarified that his comments are not meant to undermine Sanju Samson, reinforcing Dhoni's significance in the squad.

sports.title: Jasprit Bumrah's "Body Language" For MI In IPL 2026 Raises Concern: "Not The Same As In World Cup"
sports.summary: Jasprit Bumrah has struggled in IPL 2026, recording zero wickets in five matches for Mumbai Indians. Despite not being overly expensive, his performance has raised concerns, especially compared to his high standards. Observers note a difference in his body language and effectiveness since the World Cup, prompting discussions about his current form and potential impact on the team's success.

health.title: Plastic Waste to Parkinson Drug Breakthrough
health.summary: Scientists at a university have developed a method to convert plastic waste into levodopa, a crucial medication for treating Parkinson's disease. This breakthrough addresses two significant issues: the growing problem of plastic waste and the need for effective Parkinson's treatments. The innovative process could potentially lead to more sustainable drug production while reducing environmental pollution from plastics.

health.title: NTU Develops AI Biochip for 20-Minute Disease Biomarker Detection
health.summary: Researchers at Nanyang Technological University (NTU) Singapore have developed an AI-enabled biochip that detects microRNA biomarkers in just 20 minutes. This innovative system combines a nanophotonic chip with AI-based image analysis, allowing for the identification and classification of thousands of microRNA signals from a single biological sample, thus providing a faster and automated solution for disease screening.

health.title: Planning Your Baby's Diet? Nutritionist Shares Foods That Should Be Avoided In The First Year
health.summary: Nutritionist Nmami Agarwal advises parents on foods to avoid during a baby's first year to ensure healthy development. While breast milk or formula is essential, introducing solid foods requires caution. Certain foods can pose risks to infants, and careful planning is crucial for their safety and nutrition. Parents should prioritize guidance to support their baby's dietary needs effectively.

science.title: Small NASA Satellite Could Reveal How Lightning Impacts Space Weather
science.summary: NASA's CANVAS CubeSat mission aims to study very-low-frequency (VLF) radio waves generated by lightning and transmitters. Scheduled for launch on April 7, 2026, the mission seeks to enhance understanding of how lightning affects space weather, which in turn impacts satellites and astronauts. This research will contribute to knowledge of Earth-space interactions and their implications for technology in orbit.

science.title: The Lyrid meteor shower is visible now and peaking soon here's how to spot it
science.summary: The Lyrid meteor shower is currently visible and is expected to peak on Tuesday night. Skywatchers can anticipate seeing 10 to 20 shooting stars per hour, aided by a dim crescent moon. NASA encourages observers to take advantage of the clear spring skies for optimal viewing conditions during this annual celestial event.

science.title: How old is the Grand Canyon? Scientists reveal age of the structure visible from space
science.summary: A new study utilizing microscopic zircon crystals has determined the age of the Grand Canyon, revealing the timeline of its formation by the Colorado River. Researchers identified a long-lost lake, which played a crucial role in understanding the canyon's development over millions of years. This discovery sheds light on one of Earth's most recognizable geological features.

entertainment.title: Ali Asgar says he quit playing ‘Dadi’ on Kapil Sharma's show after his kids were bullied in school
entertainment.summary: Ali Asgar announced his departure from playing the character ‘Dadi’ on Kapil Sharma's show, citing concerns over his children's bullying at school. He expressed that he felt limited in his acting opportunities and was repeating himself. Asgar gained fame for his portrayal of ‘Dadi’ in Comedy Nights with Kapil, where he cross-dressed as both Dadi and Nani.

entertainment.title: Priyanka Chopra gives peek into her India diaries: From eating at local dhaba to watching Sridevi, Salman Khan films
entertainment.summary: Priyanka Chopra shared a weekend photo dump on Instagram, showcasing her experiences in India. The posts included moments with family, visits to local dhabas, and references to classic Bollywood films featuring Sridevi and Salman Khan. The candid images offered fans a glimpse into her personal life, highlighting her connection to Indian culture and cinema.

entertainment.title: Shah Rukh Khan's landlord is a fan of his humility, opens up on star staying in his flat during Mannat renovations
entertainment.summary: Shah Rukh Khan temporarily relocated from his iconic Bandra bungalow, Mannat, to two flats in a nearby apartment complex due to renovations. His landlord praised the actor's humility and expressed admiration for his respectful behavior during the stay. Shah Rukh purchased Mannat in the late 1990s, and the property is currently undergoing significant renovations.
